whatsNew.en:
Version 4.1

- New "Same day" reminder option — get notified on the day of your shift.

- Per-leave-type notifications — choose exactly which leave types should remind you.

- Clearer Notifications settings — improved permission guidance when iOS notifications are off.

- Smarter notification handling — old reminders are now cleaned up after clearing or restoring schedule data.

- Better first-run experience — new users now see a clear Set Up Schedule card when no schedule exists.

- Improved Backup and Restore feedback — failed backup or restore actions now show a clear message.

- Updated About page with the SShift app logo.

Thank you for using SShift.

Improved Arabic language and right-to-left layout support across the app.
Redesigned PDF export with a clean, always-light printable design.
New per-leave-type breakdown on the Dashboard.
Localization polish, release prep, and stability improvements.

This update includes a refreshed app icon and launch experience, improved dashboard card layout, cleaner Settings icons and spacing, better bottom navigation consistency, plus bug fixes, stability improvements, and overall UI polish.

Version 3.0 brings a major refresh to SShift with a cleaner interface, improved calendar editing, a redesigned dashboard, better settings organization, Arabic support, and a more polished overall experience.

What’s new:
• Redesigned dashboard with cleaner stats and upcoming summaries
• Improved settings layout and better visual organization
• Better About page with a clearer feature overview
• Improved calendar editing for empty days and leave selection
• Better in-app language support for English and Arabic
• Updated visuals across key screens for a cleaner experience
• Improved launch experience and overall polish
• Stability improvements and general fixes
Welcome to SShift 2.0 — a cleaner UI, a clearer calendar, smarter notes, and faster performance. Simpler, smoother, better.
